channel.title: Studies in Nonlinear Dynamics & Econometrics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Studies in Nonlinear Dynamics & Econometrics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Szabolcs Blazsek, August Jörding, Simran Rai DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Power of Unit Root Tests Against Nonlinear and Noncausal Alternatives with an Application to the Brent Crude Oil Price

item.title: Financial Condition Indices in an Incomplete Data Environment

item.title: Investigating the Impact of Consumption Distribution on CRRA Estimation: Quantile-CCAPM-Based Approach

item.title: Controlling Chaotic Fluctuations through Monetary Policy

item.title: Generalized Autoregressive Conditional Betas: A New Multivariate Score-Driven Filter
item.description: Article by Szabolcs Blazsek, August Jörding, Simran Rai DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/snde-2023-0019
